description_long: This is a modern, two-seater couch with a minimalist rectangular form and clean lines, upholstered in a dark gray fabric. The seat consists of two large, flat cushions, while the backrest is divided into two matching sections, both appearing firm and integrated into the frame. Draped over the right side of the couch is a red and black checkered blanket, adding a touch of warmth and visual contrast to the otherwise monochrome design. The armrests are broad, straight, and at the same height as the backrest, contributing to the couch's boxy silhouette. The legs are not visible, suggesting they are either recessed or the couch sits directly on the ground. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or modern living rooms.
description: A dark gray, boxy two-seater couch with broad armrests and a red-and-black checkered blanket draped over one side. The design is minimalist and modern, with no visible legs and a clean, rectangular silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing two seat cushions, two backrest sections, broad armrests, and a checkered blanket draped over the right side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blanket cascading over the seat and armrest, with the couch's straight lines and solid form visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the couch, the blanket hanging over the left side, and the continuous backrest structure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the armrest and the blanket's drape, with the seat and backrest profile visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, flat seat cushions and two matching backrest sections, all appearing attached and integrated; no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric upholstery on the couch, with a red and black checkered patterned blanket draped over one side.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base, or the couch sits directly on the floor.
attribute_armrest_design: Broad, straight armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, rectangular profile and upholstered in the same dark gray fabric.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, continuous backrest divided into two sections, attached and integrated into the frame, with a flat, unembellished surface.
